bonding.name: Bonding
bonding.description: Mastery of chemical bonding improves crafting speed and cooling efficiency.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: +5% cooling rate in crafting minigame.
Lv.2: +10% cooling rate. Reaction time reduced.
Lv.3: +15% cooling rate. Unlock faster crafting animations.
Lv.4: +20% cooling rate. Double-bond recipes available.
Lv.5: +25% cooling rate. Master Chemist status.

equation_balancing.name: Equation Balancing
equation_balancing.description: Balancing chemical equations gives a wider target zone in the crafting minigame.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: +2°C target zone width.
Lv.2: +4°C target zone width. Reaction hints shown.
Lv.3: +6°C target zone width. Trajectory angle precision +5%.
Lv.4: +8°C target zone width. Stoichiometry hints in lab.
Lv.5: +10°C target zone width. Perfect balance bonus.

precipitation.name: Precipitation Mastery
precipitation.description: Mastery of precipitation reactions speeds up crafting progress.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: +5% crafting progress per tick.
Lv.2: +10% crafting progress. Sorting bonus time +2s.
Lv.3: +15% crafting progress. Precipitation reactions highlighted.
Lv.4: +20% crafting progress. Bonus resource drops.
Lv.5: +25% crafting progress. Instant precipitation reactions.

acid_base.name: Acid-Base Sense
acid_base.description: Understanding acid-base chemistry reduces crafting failure risk.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: -5% risk of critical crafting failure.
Lv.2: -10% failure risk. pH indicators in lab.
Lv.3: -15% failure risk. Carbon calculator insight shown.
Lv.4: -20% failure risk. Neutralization reactions auto-succeed.
Lv.5: -25% failure risk. Master alchemist bonus.

recycling_mastery.name: Recycling Mastery
recycling_mastery.description: Expert knowledge of material recycling improves sorting efficiency and speed.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: +5 bonus points per correct sort.
Lv.2: +10 bonus points. Belt speed penalty reduced.
Lv.3: +15 bonus points. Material categories highlighted on hover.
Lv.4: +20 bonus points. Streak multiplier increased.
Lv.5: +25 bonus points. Perfect sort bonus doubled.

climate_science.name: Climate Science
climate_science.description: Understanding climate systems makes carbon calculator actions more efficient.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: +1 action slot in Climate Calculator.
Lv.2: +2 action slots. CO₂ impact shown before selecting.
Lv.3: +3 action slots. Delayed actions resolve faster.
Lv.4: +4 action slots. Synergy bonuses between actions.
Lv.5: +5 action slots. Master climate strategist bonus.

optics_mastery.name: Optics Mastery
optics_mastery.description: Knowledge of light and optics provides hints in light puzzles.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: Hint available in light puzzles (1 per puzzle).
Lv.2: 2 hints per puzzle. Beam color shown on hover.
Lv.3: 3 hints per puzzle. Incorrect paths highlighted.
Lv.4: 4 hints per puzzle. Components auto-suggest placements.
Lv.5: 5 hints per puzzle. Master optician — all components unlocked from start.

magnetism_mastery.name: Magnetism Mastery
magnetism_mastery.description: Mastery of magnetic fields improves trajectory puzzle precision and navigator speed.
levelDescriptions: Lv.1: Magnetic field lines shown when compass equipped.
Lv.2: +5% magnet force preview accuracy in trajectory.
Lv.3: +10% navigator movement speed along field lines.
Lv.4: +15% accuracy. Repulsion forces visualized.
Lv.5: +20% accuracy. Master physicist — max trajectory preview shown.
